message:
🌱 Support wildcard CORS origins for *.ibm.com (#871)

Replace hardcoded kc.apps.fmaas-vllm-d URL with wildcard patterns
"https://*.ibm.com" and "http://*.ibm.com" so any IBM OpenShift route
can connect to the local kc-agent. The matchOrigin() helper supports
both prefix matching (existing behavior) and wildcard suffix matching.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
